changes: Resolved an issue wherein the number of charged cartridges in the Powder Gauge displayed incorrectly after disengaging level sync under certain conditions.
Resolved an issue wherein execution of Hollow Nozuichi caused the status effects Forked Raiju Ready and Fleeting Raiju Ready to expire.
Resolved an issue wherein the description for the trait Enhanced Apex Arrow was incorrect (functionality unaffected).
Resolved an issue wherein descriptions for the PvE actions Mangetsu and Oka listed Fuga as their combo action even after learning the action Fuko (functionality unaffected).
Resolved an issue wherein the description for the action Eukrasia did not state that its recast timer is unaffected by status effects or gear attributes (functionality unaffected).
The sound effect of the action Broil IV has been adjusted.
Resolved an issue wherein the description of the status effect 'Enhanced Flare' erroneously read the 'next' Flare cast will deal increased damage (functionality unaffected).

new_content.description: Quest requiring completion of previous Chronicles of a New Era quest.

new_content.name: Character Renaming Service
new_content.description: System feature enabled for use even when servers are heavily congested.
